    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int AUTO_REAR_WIPING
      Automatically turn on the rear wiper 自动开启后雨刮，开启后判断两个条件：1、倒车，2、前雨刮开启；两个都满足则开启后雨刮，原ID：SETTING_FUNC_AUTO_REAR_WIPING ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 11:27:36
      static int DIM_DISPLAY_MODE
      Instrument View Mode 仪表视图模式，原ID：SETTING_FUNC_DIM_DISPLAY_MODE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IBcm.DisplayMode property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 10:37:05
      static int FIND_CAR_MODE
      Car search mode, three modes: honking, flashing lights, flashing lights+honking 寻车模式，三种模式：鸣笛，闪灯，闪灯+鸣笛 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IBcm.FindMode property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 13:53:15
      static int FUEL_DOOR_OPEN_CONDITION
      Notification of fuel tank pressure relief status 油箱盖泄压状态通知 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IBcm.FuelDoorOpenCondition property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-10-30 17:21:05
      static int PARKING_KEEP_POWER_TIME
      Time setting for leaving the car without turning off the power, in minutes 离车不下电时长设置，单位分钟，原ID：SETTING_FUNC_PCM_TIMER_TIME_STAMP ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 14:22:26
      static int POWER_OFF_NOTICE
      Power off notification 下电通知，关闭车通知 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type tao.zhan@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-07-10 16:38:40
      static int POWER_ONOFF_NOTICE
      Enable engine operation feedback notification 开启引擎操作反馈通知 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IBcm.PowerOnOffNotice property type tao.zhan@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-07-10 16:46:22
      static int VEHICLE_FACTORY_RESET
      Request car to factory reset 整车恢复出厂设置 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:53:20
      static int VEHICLE_FACTORY_RESET_STATUS
      Restore the factory result 整车恢复出厂设置状态 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IBcm.FactoryResetStatus property type mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:56:48
